title: Black Candles, 10 Inch Metallic Black Taper Candles, Pack of 4 Dripless Tall Twisted Candle, Unscented Dinner Candle for Candlesticks Wedding Christmas Birthday Party Decoration
features: 【Gothic Elegance Black Candles】- Create a spellbinding atmosphere with these 10-inch black taper candles, perfect for Halloween vampire decor, gothic parties, or dramatic tablescapes. Their universal 3/4" base fits most standard candle holders for effortless styling.

【Metallic Finish for Premium Style】- Featuring a sophisticated spiral design and fine-plated metallic finish, these black twisted candles add a touch of elegance to any setting — from weddings and restaurants to special events and festive celebrations.

【Advanced Drip-Resistant Technology】-Engineered with a special formula and metallised film, these black dinner candles burn evenly and steadily. When placed upright in wind-free conditions, they remain virtually drip-free for a cleaner, longer-lasting burn.

【Clean & Long-Lasting Flame】- Crafted from high-quality paraffin wax and a natural, lead-free cotton wick, these black candle sticks provide a clean, consistent flame with a burn time of 7–8 hours — ideal for extended gatherings.

【Versatile Set of 4 Tall Candles】-This set includes four elegant black spiral candles, perfect for Christmas dinners, Shabbat ceremonies, wedding decorations, prayer settings, or everyday home ambience.
